_meta.status: SYNTHETIC EXAMPLE — not a real bundle capture
_meta.purpose: Demonstrates the golden-fixture format + exercises the parity comparator's loader. Real golden fixtures are captured from the running bundle via the procedure in fixtures/README.md and MUST set bundle_sha + captured_at.

report.about: Apple Inc. designs consumer hardware, services and wearables.
report.company_summary: Apple Inc. designs consumer hardware, services and wearables.
report.investment_thesis: Services-mix margin expansion plus an installed-base upgrade cycle support multiple expansion.
report.bull_case: Gross-margin tailwind from services; resilient demand.
report.bear_case: China demand softness and regulatory overhang on the App Store.
report.news_summary: Quarter beat on services; hardware in line.
report.alternative_signals: Elevated Wikipedia pageviews; rising WSB mentions.
